title: senecio foetidus var. hydrophiloides
intro: Senecio foetidus var. hydrophiloides, also known as Giant Ragwort or Stinking Ragwort, is a variant of the Senecio foetidus plant, a member of the daisy family native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio foetidus var. hydrophiloides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
